creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pawel
Date: Sun Jul 24 14:45:17 UTC 2016
New revision: 419007
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/419007

Log:
  - GMAKE -> MAKE_CMD, MAKE_CMD is always set to required make implementation
  - CP -> INSTALL_DATA, INSTALL_DATA makes sure files are always installed
    with proper permissions
  - Fix hardcoded package description path

  PR:		211332
  Submitted by:	myself
  Approved by:	jmcneill (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/sysutils/u-boot-sinovoip-bpi-m3/Makefile
